title: Global Fusion Investment by Year and Source (2015-2024)
executive_question: How has funding evolved and who is backing fusion?
required_metrics: annual investment amount (USD) by source (venture capital, government, corporate)
preferred_sources: Fusion Industry Association annual investment reports
data_quality_rule: Use only publicly reported investment figures; cross-check with multiple sources; note any gaps in government funding data.

title: Projected LCOE Range for Fusion vs. Other Sources (2035-2050)
executive_question: How does fusion's expected cost compare to solar, wind, nuclear fission, and gas?
required_metrics: LCOE projections for fusion (low, median, high) in $/MWh for 2035, 2040, 2045, 2050
LCOE projections for solar PV, onshore wind, nuclear fission, natural gas combined cycle for same years
comparison_set: fusion vs. solar, wind, nuclear fission, natural gas
preferred_sources: Lazard Levelized Cost of Energy Analysis
search_queries: Lazard LCOE 2024 solar wind nuclear gas
data_quality_rule: Use official LCOE ranges from authoritative sources; clearly label uncertainty bands; if fusion projections are scarce, note as evidence gap.

title: Fusion Technology Readiness Levels (TRL) by Approach
executive_question: Which fusion technologies are closest to commercial deployment?
required_metrics: TRL score (1-9) for each approach (magnetic confinement, inertial confinement, alternative)
key milestones achieved (e.g., ignition, net energy gain, magnet test) with dates
comparison_set: magnetic confinement (tokamak, stellarator), inertial confinement (laser, NIF), alternative (compact, aneutronic)
preferred_sources: Journal of Fusion Energy TRL assessments
data_quality_rule: TRL scores must be based on published assessments or expert consensus; avoid self-reported scores from companies without third-party validation.

title: Timeline to First Commercial Fusion Plant: Company Projections vs. Expert Surveys
executive_question: What is the realistic timeline for grid-connected fusion?
required_metrics: target year for first commercial plant from each major company (e.g., Commonwealth Fusion, TAE, General Fusion, Helion)
median and range of expert survey estimates (e.g., from Fusion Industry Association or academic surveys)
preferred_sources: Nature or MIT Technology Review expert polls
search_queries: TAE Technologies first fusion plant target year
Fusion Industry Association expert survey timeline 2024
data_quality_rule: Use only official company statements or published survey results; note if companies have revised timelines; include confidence intervals from surveys.

title: Regulatory Pathway Comparison: Fusion vs. Fission Licensing
executive_question: What are the key regulatory hurdles and how long might they take?
required_metrics: key regulatory milestones for fusion (e.g., NRC rulemaking completion, IAEA safety guidelines publication, first license application)
typical licensing timeline for fission plants (years from application to operation)
comparison_set: fusion regulatory pathway vs. fission licensing timeline
preferred_sources: NRC fusion rulemaking documents and public meeting notes
World Nuclear Association fission licensing data
data_quality_rule: Use official regulatory documents and timelines; note that fusion licensing is still evolving; compare with historical fission licensing data.
